Video.summary: Jillian dives into an off-grid dream when she visits a one-of-a-kind Quonset hut in Joshua Tree.
Video.title: Off-Grid Living: The Creative Space

Video.summary: Jillian visits two homeowners who have taken containers—and creativity—to extraordinary new heights.
Video.title: Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes

Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes

Video.summary: Jillian learns how history inspires the future, touring boundary-pushing homes with a modern twist.
Video.title: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels

Image.alt: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels
Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels
Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels

Video.summary: Jillian dives into community living, exploring how we create spaces that bring us closer together.
Video.title: From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone

Image.alt: From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone
From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone
From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone

Video.summary: From sowing to reaping, everything Nina and Brendon do is connected to the rhythm of the seasons.
Video.title: A Season for Everything

Video.summary: Captain Boomies meets Tom Biddix—a yachtsman who helped design the demo yacht they take for a spin.
Video.title: Tom's "Team Monarch"

Video.summary: It’s time for hands to get dirty as Nina unearths the wonders of good soil.
Video.title: Good Soil

Video.summary: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.
Video.title: The Gambin's "Offline"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies gets a look at the Pipe Dream - equal parts sport machine and floating celebration.
Video.title: Captain Cholly's "Pipe Dream"

Video.summary: Meet Nina and Brendan, who swapped sound checks for soil and left life on the road for life on a farm.
Video.title: Welcome to the Farm

Video.summary: Nina proves that citrus trees teach us valuable things about seasons and relationships.
Video.title: Fields not Factories

Video.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Captain Boomies joins the Arnold family for a very special maiden voyage.
Video.title: The Arnold's "A-Sea"

Video.summary: Andrea goes to Nashville to spend a day with Brad Rempel, lead singer of country music sensation High Valley.
Video.title: Brad Rempel's Country Music Cottage

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Kylie and Charli bring smart solutions, bold materials, and thoughtful styling to a first home.
Video.title: Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined

Image.alt: Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined
Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined

Video.summary: Andrea's off to Palm Springs for a fun-filled day with actor Jonathan Bennett.
Video.title: Jonathan Bennett’s Mai Tai Manor

Video.title: Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: Building & Tending Your Garden

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: A Bountiful Harvest

Video.summary: Kimberly and Justin need an overhaul for their twelve-sided, dodecagon dream house.
Video.title: Kimberly & Justin’s Dodecagon Dream

Video.title: Moody & Masculine Mid-Century Style

Video.summary: Jack and Tyler have made their home picture-perfect, but now it’s time for the exterior to shine.
Video.title: Jack & Tyler’s Colorful Curb Appeal

Video.summary: Eduardo and Gabriela's ‘little’ home projects have piled up and they’re ready for Drew’s help.
Video.title: Eduardo & Gabriela’s Guest Retreat

Video.summary: Nina and Brendon’s walk through the dark valley leads to unforeseen miracles and joy.
Video.title: After the Rain

Video.summary: As the Shirley family farm continues to grow, so does the community it celebrates.
Video.title: The Joy of Sharing

Video.summary: Leia Ward transforms a traditional colonial home into a getaway with a fresh, coastal vibe.
Video.title: New England Modern Coastal Reno

Video.summary: Andrea’s off to Huntington Beach, California to spend the day with Cassie Randolph.
Video.title: Cassie Randolph’s Beachside Bungalow

Video.summary: Maegan found freedom in art and rediscovered her creativity the moment she picked up a brush.
Video.title: Maegan's Reconnection

Video.summary: Casey takes on stunning stencil work as she steps into her confidence as a leader.
Video.title: Casey's Shadows Turned Light

Video.summary: Chris restores a stunning vanity, breaking free from the chains of low self-worth.
Video.title: Christopher's Creativity

Video.summary: Kameron's new life is built on hard work, life experience, and the love of true friends.
Video.title: Kameron's Deep Dive

Video.summary: Leia T. Ward pays homage to the waterfront views in this modern coastal house.
Video.title: Modern Waterfront Beach House
